SensVX x Elsewedy Electric

AI-Powered Cable
Defect Detection

Multi-sensor fusion technology that detects, classifies, and prevents cable manufacturing defects in real time — delivering zero-defect production at industrial scale.

Discover Our SolutionPartner With Us

About Us

Where Sensor Intelligence
Meets Manufacturing Excellence

SensVX is a pioneering deep-tech software company building the next generation of quality assurance for the cable industry. In strategic partnership with Elsewedy Electric, we combine advanced sensor arrays with proprietary AI to transform how cables are inspected, qualified, and certified.

Our mission is to eliminate defective cables from reaching the market, reducing waste, preventing failures, and ensuring safety across power grids, infrastructure, and industrial networks worldwide.

Optical Sensing

High-resolution cameras capture surface defects, insulation irregularities, and color deviations at line speed.

Ultrasonic Analysis

Ultrasonic transducers detect internal voids, delamination, and structural anomalies invisible to the eye.

Electromagnetic Testing

Eddy current and partial discharge sensors identify conductor faults and insulation breakdown risks.

AI Fusion Engine

Deep learning models fuse multi-sensor data in real time for precise defect classification and root cause analysis.

Our Solutions

End-to-End Intelligent Cable Inspection

From surface scanning to deep internal analysis, our suite of AI-powered solutions covers every aspect of cable quality assurance throughout the production lifecycle.

01
Optical AI

Inline Surface Inspection

High-speed optical scanning detects surface scratches, dents, discoloration, and insulation damage on every meter of cable at full production speed.

02
Ultrasonic

Internal Structure Analysis

Ultrasonic sensors penetrate cable layers to identify voids, delamination, conductor eccentricity, and sheath thickness variations in real time.

03
Deep Learning

AI Defect Classification

Proprietary deep learning models classify defect type, severity, and root cause instantly, enabling immediate corrective action on the production line.

04
Monitoring

Real-Time Monitoring Dashboard

A centralized control dashboard provides live production quality metrics, defect heatmaps, trend analysis, and instant alerts for quality managers.

05
Predictive

Predictive Quality Analytics

Machine learning models analyze historical and live data to predict potential defects before they occur, enabling proactive process adjustments.

06
Compliance

Automated Compliance Reporting

Auto-generate quality certification reports aligned with IEC, ISO, and regional cable standards. Full traceability for every cable segment produced.

Our Value

Why Leading Manufacturers Choose SensVX

We deliver end-to-end intelligent inspection that transforms cable quality assurance from reactive sampling to proactive, AI-driven precision.

Zero-Defect Production

Catch every defect before it leaves the factory. Our multi-sensor AI identifies micro-level flaws that traditional inspection misses.

Real-Time Inspection

Inline detection at full production speed. No sampling, no slowdowns — every meter of cable is inspected continuously.

Cost Reduction

Reduce scrap rates, warranty claims, and field failures. Predictive insights help optimize processes before defects occur.

Precision Classification

AI-driven defect classification with 99.7% accuracy. Know exactly what went wrong and why, every single time.

Actionable Analytics

Comprehensive dashboards and reporting for production teams, quality managers, and executive leadership.

Seamless Integration

Plug into existing manufacturing lines with minimal downtime. Compatible with all major cable production equipment.

Our Impact

Transforming Cable Manufacturing with Measurable Results

0.0%

Defect Detection Accuracy

0.0%

Reduction in Scrap Rate

0x

Faster Than Manual Inspection

0M+

Meters of Cable Inspected

Jan – Apr 2025

Concept & Planning

Project idea development, research, system design, and dataset preparation for the AI-based cable defect detection system.

May – Aug 2025

Prototyping & Integration

Development of the AI detection model, 3D sensing prototype, and integration with the software dashboard and database system.

Sep – Dec 2025

Validation & Publishing

System testing, performance evaluation, documentation, and preparation of the research publication.

Our Team

Engineers, Scientists, and Industry Experts

Our world-class team brings together deep expertise in AI, sensor technology, and cable manufacturing to build solutions that redefine industrial quality assurance.

NKA

Nada Karam Awad

Full-Stack & AI Developer

Develops the dashboard, database integration, and contributes to AI model deployment and system usability.

ATH

Abdullah Tarek Hassan

Cyber Security Engineer

Responsible for system security, infrastructure protection, and secure integration of the AI inspection platform.

AME

Ahmed Mostafa Elalfy

AI & Computer Vision Engineer

Develops deep learning models for cable defect detection and works on training and optimizing YOLO-based systems.

FMA

Fares Mohsen Abdelaziz

Software Engineer

Focuses on backend development, system integration, and building scalable components for the inspection platform.

MEA

Moustafa Ehab Abdelalim

Computer Vision Engineer

Works on image processing, sensor data handling, and improving defect detection accuracy.

JZZ

Software Developer

Supports software development, testing, and UI improvements for the inspection and analytics platform.
